stemHtml: Regarding the use of squawk code 7601, this should be used by…

options.a: An aircraft with radio communication failure, IFR in IMC, planning to land at the nearest suitable airport.
options.b: An aircraft with radio communication failure, IFR in VMC, planning to land at the nearest suitable airport.
options.c: An aircraft with radio communication failure, IFR in VMC, planning to continue to the destination airport.
options.d: An aircraft with radio communication failure, IFR in IMC, planning to continue to the destination airport.
